sentences.arabic: قَرَأَتِ الْبِنْتُ: «إِذَا أَرَدْتَ أَنْ تُطَاعَ فَاطْلُبْ الْمُسْتَطَاعَ».
sentences.translation: Djevojka je pročitala: «Ako hoćeš da budeš poslušan, traži ono što je moguće».
sentences.translationEn: The girl read: «If you want to be obeyed, ask for what is possible».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الطَّلَبَاتِ يَجِبُ أَنْ تَكُونَ مَعْقُولَةً.
sentences.translation: To znači da zahtjevi moraju biti razumni.
sentences.translationEn: This means that requests must be reasonable.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ الأَبُ مِنَ ابْنِهِ تَرْتِيبَ غُرْفَتِهِ فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Otac je od sina tražio samo da sredi svoju sobu.
sentences.translationEn: The father asked his son only to tidy his room.

sentences.translation: Sin ju je brzo sredio bez žalbe.
sentences.translationEn: The son tidied it quickly and without complaint.
